column1: # Workshop: full read/use for all authenticated Developer Hub users (OIDC / Keycloak).
# Keycloak + catalog-users.yaml use group developers (user1..userN memberOf developers).
# Kuadrant (permission names per docs.kuadrant.io — no hyphen in apiproduct)
# Platform Admin — explicit full access (supplements policyAdminUser bypass)
# Admin: explicit permissions (rbac-backend does not support role inheritance)
